findings.location: s4 — 設定プロパティ table
findings.description: The property table includes a「必須」(required) column and marks `filePath` as required (○) while all other properties are left blank (implying optional). The source file provides configuration examples with comments but never explicitly designates any property as required vs optional. This required/optional distinction is an inference not present in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source lists properties only via code example comments: `# 書き込み先のファイルパスを指定する。` etc. — no required/optional designation appears anywhere in the source.
